'''mofasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadgoing|roadgoing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadgoing|roadgoing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mofasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofasithi|mofasithi]] || [[word:mofasiji|mofasiji]] || [[word:mofasishi|mofasishi]] || [[word:mofasiki|mofasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofasuthuthu|mofasuthuthu]] || [[word:mofasujuju|mofasujuju]] || [[word:mofasushushu|mofasushushu]] || [[word:mofasukuku|mofasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofasuthu|mofasuthu]] || [[word:mofasuju|mofasuju]] || [[word:mofasushu|mofasushu]] || [[word:mofasuku|mofasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofasufthuf|mofasufthuf]] || [[word:mofasufjuf|mofasufjuf]] || [[word:mofasufshuf|mofasufshuf]] || [[word:mofasufkuf|mofasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofasethe|mofasethe]] || [[word:mofaseje|mofaseje]] || [[word:mofaseshe|mofaseshe]] || [[word:mofaseke|mofaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofasothotho|mofasothotho]] || [[word:mofasojojo|mofasojojo]] || [[word:mofasoshosho|mofasoshosho]] || [[word:mofasokoko|mofasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofasotho|mofasotho]] || [[word:mofasojo|mofasojo]] || [[word:mofasosho|mofasosho]] || [[word:mofasoko|mofasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofasofthof|mofasofthof]] || [[word:mofasofjof|mofasofjof]] || [[word:mofasofshof|mofasofshof]] || [[word:mofasofkof|mofasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfthÃŸf|mofasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfjÃŸf|mofasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfshÃŸf|mofasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfkÃŸf|mofasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mofasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mofasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mofasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mofasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfthÃŸf|mofasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfjÃŸf|mofasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfshÃŸf|mofasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfkÃŸf|mofasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfthÃŸf|mofasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfjÃŸf|mofasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfshÃŸf|mofasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mofasÃŸfkÃŸf|mofasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mofasÃḊthÃḊ|mofasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mofasÃḊjÃḊ|mofasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mofasÃḊshÃḊ|mofasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mofasÃḊkÃḊ|mofasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mofasathatha|mofasathatha]] || [[word:mofasajaja|mofasajaja]] || [[word:mofasashasha|mofasashasha]] || [[word:mofasakaka|mofasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mofasatha|mofasatha]] || [[word:mofasaja|mofasaja]] || [[word:mofasasha|mofasasha]] || [[word:mofasaka|mofasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mofasafthaf|mofasafthaf]] || [[word:mofasafjaf|mofasafjaf]] || [[word:mofasafshaf|mofasafshaf]] || [[word:mofasafkaf|mofasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mofasasha|mofasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofashÃḋsha|mofashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofasrosha|mofasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofasmusha|mofasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofasyasha|mofasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofasnkshÃḋsha|gomofasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofasnkrosha|gomofasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofasnkmusha|gomofasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofasnkyasha|gomofasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mofafasasha|mofafasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofafashÃḋsha|mofafashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofafasrosha|mofafasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofafasmusha|mofafasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofafasyasha|mofafasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofafasnkshÃḋsha|gomofafasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofafasnkrosha|gomofafasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofafasnkmusha|gomofafasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofafasnkyasha|gomofafasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mefÃḊsasha|mefÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mefÃḊshÃḋsha|mefÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mefÃḊsrosha|mefÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mefÃḊsmusha|mefÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mefÃḊsyasha|mefÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomefÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gomefÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomefÃḊsnkrosha|gomefÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomefÃḊsnkmusha|gomefÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomefÃḊsnkyasha|gomefÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mofasasha|mofasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mofashÃḋsha|mofashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mofasrosha|mofasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mofasmusha|mofasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mofasyasha|mofasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomofasnkshÃḋsha|gomofasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomofasnkrosha|gomofasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomofasnkmusha|gomofasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomofasnkyasha|gomofasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
